description: Umbrella planning ticket for the anonymous-precheck onboarding reorder. Completed by creating and approving the implementation plan in session 33f55611-0b07-47e0-9ba3-7c28653bd769 and decomposing the work into child tickets T-108 through T-113. Target flow: privacy notice before anonymous precheck, sealed/opaque anonymous precheck context, account binding with durable privacy evidence, telehealth/platform consent before MDI, MDI patient/profile questionnaire without answer retention, and treatment-specific medication disclosure before billing/prescribing. The concrete implementation remains tracked by child tickets.
title: Anonymous precheck onboarding reorder
